semantic_description: Verifies string_all_digits, a read-only null-terminated character-array scan. The function iterates from index 0 until the first 0 terminator, returns 0 immediately if any character is outside ASCII digit range 48..57, and returns 1 after reaching the terminator when all inspected characters are digits. The contract requires a CharArray::full buffer containing l followed by 0, assumes all elements before the terminator are nonzero, preserves the entire buffer, and relates the return value to the Coq recursive string_all_digits_spec over l.
